title: Stop testing your SAAS manually
summary: KaneAI is an AI-powered QA testing tool that automates test generation and execution for software deployments. Users describe tests in plain English and the tool writes, runs, and validates them automatically, reportedly reducing testing costs by 50%.
writeup: This video introduces KaneAI, an AI-powered QA tool that automates test generation and execution for software deployments. Tests are described in plain English, and the tool writes, runs, and validates them automatically, reportedly cutting testing costs by 50%. It frames QA as a workflow automation problem driven by AI agents and prompt-based test specification, replacing manual SaaS testing.
